indicators.name: no bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or any resting surface makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture or objects for comfort
indicators.rationale: There are no objects or furniture to provide comfort or support for sleep.

indicators.name: no window or curtains
indicators.rationale: No window or curtains to control light and provide privacy.

indicators.name: no enclosed layout
indicators.rationale: No enclosed layout to provide a low-disturbance environment.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for sleep (primary). There is no bed or resting surface, no furniture or objects for comfort, no window or curtains to control light and provide privacy, and no enclosed layout to provide a low-disturbance environment. The lack of any features that support sleep makes this space inadequate for the primary sleep activity.
